---
name: "🛠️ Setup / Dev Environment"
about: Trouble getting LifeOS running locally or in deployment
title: "[Setup]: "
labels: ["setup", "help wanted"]
assignees: []
---

## What are you trying to set up?
- [ ] Local frontend (React + Tailwind)
- [ ] Local backend (Node.js + Express)
- [ ] MongoDB connection
- [ ] Ollama (local AI)
- [ ] OpenAI (BYOK)
- [ ] Vercel deployment (frontend)
- [ ] Render deployment (backend)
- [ ] Git remotes (GitHub `origin` / GitLab `gitlab`)
- [ ] CI/CD (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI / Husky hooks)
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## What happened?
Describe the error or unexpected behavior. Paste the exact error message if you have one.

## What you've already tried
- [ ] Checked `.env` values match `.env.example`
- [ ] Confirmed `VITE_API_URL` / backend URL is correct
- [ ] Re-ran `npm install`
- [ ] Checked Node/npm version
- [ ] Checked relevant log file (e.g. `backend_error_handler.log`)

## Environment
- **OS:**
- **Node version:**
- **Where this happens:** local / Vercel / Render / GitLab CI / GitHub Actions

## Additional context
Anything else that might help diagnose this.
